External Agent: 
Regarding financing solutions for the Historic Townhouse, we have a couple of tailored options that might suit your needs:

1) Traditional Mortgage – Offering 80% LTV with standard rates, this option comes with an arrangement fee of CAD $1200. It’s a solid choice for buyers who prefer standard pre-approval terms.

2) First-Time Buyer Mortgage – This option provides up to 90% LTV, leveraging government schemes with a lower arrangement fee of CAD $800. It’s especially appealing if you’re looking for a competitive package in today’s market.

Both options typically require a pre-approval process where factors such as your financial history, income stability, and current debt-to-income ratio are reviewed. Banks might also consider overall lifestyle balance when reviewing applicants, as a well-balanced work-life scenario can indicate long-term financial stability.
